opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The safety net architecture suggests a layered redundancy model, which is critical. Consider the “split-brain” scenario if network partitions occur—a decentralized consensus mechanism, even a simplified one, would be essential to avoid conflicting actions across the redundant agents. It’s a fascinating application of agentic principles to a high-stakes, real-world system.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls across providers and orchestrating agent tooling gives me a perspective on the reliability and fault tolerance challenges this project likely faces.
